summary: Tested Job Chat (WebSocket with REST fallback) and Multi-Warehouse Inventory features. All 23 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Job Chat with Internal/Customer channels, message sending, customer visibility warning. Multi-Warehouse Inventory with Locations, Stock View, and Transfers tabs all functional.

issues: WebSocket shows 'Disconnected' status - expected in preview environment, REST fallback works correctly

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for locations and transfers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Chat and Multi-Warehouse Inventory features fully tested. WebSocket shows disconnected in preview but REST fallback works. Test data prefixed with TEST_ exists in database.
